fields.label: Frequency
fields.rationale: Weekdays skips Saturday / Sunday. Weekly fires once a week on the day_of_week field. Monthly fires on the day_of_month field (default 1st). Daily fires every day at the site's scheduler tick.

fields.label: Day of week (Weekly only)
fields.rationale: Only meaningful when frequency='Weekly'. Default Monday matches the common 'weekly review on Monday morning' convention.

fields.label: Report format
fields.rationale: HTML renders inline in the email body (most accessible). CSV / XLSX attach as files. PDF attaches as PDF - requires the underlying Report to render via a Print Format, which adds a dependency on wkhtmltopdf / chrome.

fields.label: Report filters (JSON string)
fields.rationale: JSON object of filter values passed to the Report at run time. Example: '{"status": "Overdue"}' for an Overdue Invoices report. '{}' means run the report with its default filters. The keys must match the Report's declared filters.

fields.label: Date field for rolling window
fields.rationale: When set, names a date column in the Report's output. Combined with dynamic_date_filters_based_on, the scheduler auto-fills a rolling window (e.g. last 7 days, last month) so the same Auto Email Report runs sensibly week-over-week without manual filter edits.

fields.label: Rolling window preset
fields.rationale: Used with from_date_field to auto-compute a rolling date filter. 'Weekly' = last 7 days; 'Monthly' = last month; etc. Empty disables the rolling window (filters stay static).

fields.label: Max rows to include
fields.rationale: Caps the number of rows in the email. Large reports become unwieldy in email body; 100 is a reasonable balance. Raise for CSV / XLSX formats where attachment size is the only constraint.

fields.label: Only send if report has data
fields.rationale: Default 1: SILENTLY SUPPRESSES the email when the filtered report has zero rows. Useful for exception reports ('overdue invoices') where no data means no action. Set 0 to always send (confirms the job is alive but clutters inboxes).

fields.label: Description (included in the email body)
fields.rationale: Optional intro paragraph rendered above the report output. Jinja-templated over the report context.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.rationale: Default enabled. Disabled Auto Email Reports remain in the DB but are skipped by the scheduler.
